docs.title: AWS Mastery Path
docs.text: A structured, module-wise AWS training program that takes you from creating your first IAM user to designing production-grade, master-level cloud architecture — with runnable CLI commands and real configuration in every module, and a hands-on project at the end of each level.

docs.title: How the program is organized
docs.text: Level Focus Modules Level 1 · Entry Account setup, IAM, EC2, S3, VPC, RDS, Lambda, CloudWatch, CloudFormation 9 topics + 1 capstone Level 2 · Intermediate Containers, auto scaling, DNS, messaging, DynamoDB, CDN, cost management 9 topics + 1 project Level 3 · Advanced Advanced networking, Kubernetes (EKS), IaC with Terraform, CI/CD, security 9 topics + 1 project Level 4 · Master Well-Architected Framework, data lakes, multi-account strategy, chaos engineering 9 topics + 1 capstone

docs.title: How to use this site
docs.text:
• Work through each level in order — later modules assume earlier ones.
  • Every topic page has runnable AWS CLI commands and config snippets — copy them into your own terminal (with aws configure already set up) to follow along.
  • Each level ends with a project that combines everything learned in that level.
  • Many Level 1 modules provision real AWS resources. Free tier covers most of it, but always tear down what you create — the capstone module has an explicit cleanup checklist, and it's worth forming that habit early.
  • Use the search bar (top of the page) to jump straight to a topic.

Start here → Level 1 · Entry
